## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on iPhone via Expo Go (`npm run tunnel`)
- [ ] Full playthrough still completes in ≤ 5 minutes
- [ ] Typewriter pacing feels atmospheric (not too fast, not tedious)
- [ ] No TypeScript errors (`npm run ts:check`)
- [ ] Story content tone is warm and not preachy
- [ ] Buttons only appear after typewriter finishes
- [ ] Auto-scroll works — player never needs to scroll manually

## Branch target

PRs should target `develop`, not `main`.
`develop` → `main` only when a milestone is stable and fully tested on device.
